top_signals.title: French Resilience to Iran War Wilts in Blow to Budget Plans
top_signals.summary: France’s economic sturdiness in the face of the Iran war shock is crumbling, jeopardizing plans to rein in the budget deficit as the country gears up for a pivotal election in 2027.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ukraine probes teen suspect in cyber theft scheme targeting California online shoppers
top_signals.summary: The investigation began after U.S. authorities informed their Ukrainian counterparts that hackers operating from Ukraine could be involved in attacks targeting users of American e-commerce platforms, Ukraine's Prosecutor General said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Morrisons blames UK government policy for shutting 100 lossmaking stores
top_signals.summary: Closures are latest cost-cutting step by UK supermarket chain
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Euan Blair’s Multiverse ‘needs attention’, says English education watchdog
top_signals.summary: Ofsted found the start-up was falling short in four out of the five areas assessed
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
